ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "years_at_company" INTEGER /* Number of years the employee has been with the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee this metric belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the performance metric */,
  "average_monthly_hours" INTEGER /* Average monthly hours worked by the employee */,
  "project_count" INTEGER /* Number of projects the employee has worked on */,
  "satisfaction" INTEGER /* Satisfaction score of the employee */,
  "evaluation" INTEGER /* Evaluation score of the employee */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance evaluation took place */,
  "satisfaction_survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satisfaction survey related to the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnover_rates" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department this record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the turnover record */,
  "turnover_rate" REAL /* Percentage of employee turnover for the department */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the turnover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnover_rates_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work accident record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee involved in the accident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the accident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_accidents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_histories" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee this salary record belongs to */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary amount for the record */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary became effective */,
  "promotion" INTEGER /* Whether the salary increase was due to a promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_histories_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department responsible for the project */,
  "client" TEXT /* Client name for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satisfaction_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who took the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Satisfaction score from the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satisfaction_surveys_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation took place */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score received in the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals set for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., HR, Manager, Employee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
